templates.title: AI Product Launch - Holographic UI Reveal
templates.description: Futuristic product reveal with holographic UI, neural network visualizations, and AI-powered features demonstration

prompt.main: Camera emerges from inside a pulsing neural network, synaptic connections firing with data. Holographic interface materializes in 3D space, floating panels displaying real-time AI processing metrics. Product assembles from quantum particles, each component highlighted with technical specifications. AI avatar emerges from light particles, demonstrating voice commands and predictive capabilities. Neural processing unit glows as it processes complex tasks instantly. Finale shows product floating in space surrounded by its ecosystem of connected devices and services.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth fly-through neural pathways, orbital product showcase, push into holographic UI details, pull back for ecosystem view
elements.subject: Next-generation AI device with transparent OLED display, neural processing unit, and holographic projection capabilities
elements.scene: Futuristic laboratory with floating holographic displays, quantum computing terminals, clean minimalist design
elements.motion: Data streams flowing between neurons, UI panels sliding and transforming, product rotation, particle effects
elements.lighting: Neon blue and purple accent lights, volumetric holographic glows, clean white product spotlighting, subtle lens flares
elements.atmosphere: Cutting-edge innovation, scientific precision, future-forward thinking, premium technology
elements.style: Minority Report meets Apple keynote with Blade Runner 2049 aesthetics

modifiedElements.scene: Pure white infinity cove with subtle grid floor
modifiedElements.lighting: Soft gradient lighting, minimal color accents

modifiedElements.scene: Black void with neon data streams

bestPractices: Synchronize neural network pulses with feature reveals
Use consistent brand color palette throughout
Ensure holographic UI elements are readable and purposeful
Balance technical complexity with visual clarity

examples.sampleOutput: Microsoft HoloLens 2 launch, Magic Leap presentations, Apple Vision Pro reveal

templates.title: Robotics Demo - Industrial Automation Showcase
templates.description: Advanced industrial robots performing precision tasks with real-time sensor data overlays and AI decision-making visualization

prompt.main: Opening shot tracks alongside massive industrial robot arm performing micro-precision welding. AR overlay displays real-time data: force feedback graphs, positional accuracy to 0.001mm, temperature readings, and AI decision trees. Split-screen reveals human operator using haptic gloves for remote operation, feeling every texture. Time-lapse shows 24/7 operation with productivity metrics climbing. Close-up on advanced gripper with thousands of sensors mimicking human touch. Multiple robots choreograph complex assembly ballet. Final shot pulls back to reveal entire smart factory ecosystem.

elements.cameraMovement: Dynamic dolly shots matching robot movements, crane shots for scale, macro lenses for detail work, smooth transitions between stations
elements.subject: 6-axis industrial robots with AI vision systems, collaborative robots, and autonomous mobile robots
elements.scene: Smart factory floor with IoT sensors, real-time monitoring dashboards, safety zones with light curtains
elements.motion: Precise robotic articulation, data streams updating in real-time, parts moving on conveyors, sparks from welding
elements.lighting: Industrial LED arrays, laser measurement beams, warning lights, welding arcs, status indicator glows
elements.atmosphere: Precision engineering, automated efficiency, human-robot collaboration, Industry 4.0 transformation
elements.style: Technical documentary cinematography with dynamic data visualization overlays

modifiedElements.subject: Surgical robot performing minimally invasive procedure
modifiedElements.scene: Operating room with sterile field, monitoring equipment
modifiedElements.lighting: Surgical lights, soft ambient, monitor glows

modifiedElements.subject: Hospitality and service robots interacting with humans
modifiedElements.scene: Hotel lobby, restaurant, or retail environment

bestPractices: Show both speed and precision capabilities equally
Include human workers for scale and collaboration context
Highlight safety features and fail-safe systems
Display real metrics and KPIs, not just animations

examples.sampleOutput: Boston Dynamics Atlas demos, KUKA robot showcases, ABB factory automation videos

templates.title: Software Interface Tour - Gesture-Controlled AR Workspace
templates.description: Next-generation gesture-controlled interface with AR elements and AI-powered productivity features

prompt.main: POV shot: hands enter frame wearing sleek AR rings. Gesture summons floating holographic desktop. Pinch-zoom expands spreadsheet into 3D data visualization. Voice command 'analyze trends' triggers AI to highlight patterns with particle effects. Grab gesture pulls email from inbox, swipe sorts into projects. Two-hand gesture opens immersive video conference, participants appear as holograms. AI assistant materializes, suggests workflow optimizations. Hand wave dismisses notifications. Finale shows multiple users collaborating in shared AR space, passing documents like physical objects.

elements.cameraMovement: First-person perspective with smooth head movements, occasional third-person shots showing full workspace, close-ups on gesture details
elements.subject: Revolutionary AR operating system with gesture recognition, AI integration, and collaborative features
elements.scene: Modern office transitioning between physical and augmented reality, floating UI elements in 3D space
elements.motion: Hand gestures, UI elements responding with physics, data flowing between applications, particle transitions
elements.lighting: Natural office lighting with holographic glows, UI element illumination, subtle hand tracking indicators
elements.atmosphere: Intuitive interaction, magical productivity, seamless integration, future of work
elements.style: Iron Man's JARVIS interface meets modern minimalist design with Minority Report influences

bestPractices: Keep gesture vocabulary simple and intuitive
Show clear visual feedback for every interaction
Demonstrate real productivity gains, not just flashy effects
Include accessibility features in demonstrations

examples.sampleOutput: Microsoft Mesh demos, Meta Quest Pro showcases, Apple Vision Pro interface videos

templates.title: IoT Smart Home - Connected Device Ecosystem
templates.description: Visualization of smart home devices communicating through visible data streams with AI orchestration

prompt.main: Dawn time-lapse: smart home awakens. Data streams visualize as flowing light between devices. Wearable detects REM cycle ending, signals coffee maker. Blinds adjust to sunrise, lights fade up matching circadian rhythm. Security AI recognizes family member approaching, unlocks door, adjusts climate. Energy visualization shows solar panels charging Tesla, routing excess to grid. Kitchen activates based on calendar breakfast meeting. Voice command triggers 'leaving home' - all systems optimize for efficiency. Dashboard hologram shows energy saved, security status, air quality improving.

elements.cameraMovement: Single continuous shot flowing through rooms like data itself, rising crane shots showing whole home, detail push-ins on key moments
elements.subject: Integrated ecosystem of 50+ smart devices including solar, security, climate, entertainment, and health monitoring
elements.scene: Modern sustainable home with seamless tech integration, data streams visible as AR overlay
elements.motion: Data flowing between devices like rivers of light, status indicators pulsing, devices activating in sequence
elements.lighting: Natural light progression from dawn to day, device status glows, data stream illumination
elements.atmosphere: Seamless automation, sustainable living, security, comfort, efficiency
elements.style: Architectural visualization meets data art with organic flow

bestPractices: Show practical daily benefits, not just technology
Visualize data flows clearly without overwhelming
Demonstrate interoperability between different brands
Include privacy and security features

examples.sampleOutput: Google Home ecosystem videos, Amazon Smart Home showcases, Apple HomeKit demonstrations

templates.title: Quantum Computing Lab - Cryogenic Chamber Visualization
templates.description: Journey into quantum computer showcasing cryogenic chambers, qubit states, and quantum supremacy achievements

prompt.main: Camera descends through layers of dilution refrigerator, temperature dropping to near absolute zero. Golden quantum processor revealed in crystalline clarity. Visualization shows qubits as glowing spheres on Bloch sphere, performing calculations in superposition. Split screen: classical computer struggling with protein folding vs quantum solving instantly. Entangled particles visualized as connected across dimensional space. Quantum algorithm optimization shows millions of possibilities collapsing to solution. Error correction visualized as protective shields. Final shot: quantum advantage chart showing exponential speedup.

elements.cameraMovement: Vertical descent through cooling stages, orbital movements around qubit visualizations, zoom from chip to cosmic scale
elements.subject: 1000+ qubit quantum processor achieving quantum advantage in optimization problems
elements.scene: Quantum research facility with cryogenic systems, control rooms, visualization chambers
elements.motion: Qubit state rotations, entanglement connections pulsing, calculation waves, temperature gradients
elements.lighting: Cold blue for quantum realm, warm gold for classical comparison, ethereal glows for quantum states
elements.atmosphere: Scientific breakthrough, mind-bending physics, accessible complexity, transformative technology
elements.style: Science visualization meets cinematic storytelling with educational clarity

modifiedElements.subject: Quantum computing in finance and logistics
modifiedElements.scene: Trading floor and supply chain visualizations

bestPractices: Balance scientific accuracy with visual metaphors
Show practical applications alongside theory
Use temperature and scale indicators for context
Include comparison with classical computing

examples.sampleOutput: IBM Quantum videos, Google quantum supremacy announcement, IonQ demonstrations

templates.title: Startup Pitch Deck - Dynamic Data Visualization
templates.description: High-energy pitch deck video with dynamic data viz, market opportunities, and growth trajectory

prompt.main: Logo materializes from data particles forming company name. Problem statement: fragmented market visualized as scattered puzzle pieces. Solution: elegant algorithm connects pieces into unified platform. TAM visualization: globe with expanding market reach, $50B opportunity counter climbing. Product demo: UI performing 10x faster than competitors, side-by-side comparison. Customer testimonials appear as holographic avatars with satisfaction metrics. Team section: founders emerge with credentials and past exits highlighted. Traction graph: exponential growth curve with real revenue numbers. Competition matrix builds showing clear differentiation. Investment ask with use of funds visualization. Contact CTA with animated QR code.

elements.cameraMovement: Energetic transitions, data-driven camera movements following metrics, dynamic zooms on key points
elements.subject: B2B SaaS platform disrupting traditional industry with AI-powered automation
elements.scene: Abstract data space with company brand colors, transitioning through different visualization environments
elements.motion: Charts building dynamically, numbers counting up, smooth transitions between sections, particle effects
elements.lighting: Brand colors as primary light sources, bright optimistic tones, strategic highlights on key metrics
elements.atmosphere: Innovative, confident, data-driven, investment-worthy, high growth potential
elements.style: Silicon Valley energy meets Bloomberg data visualization with TED talk clarity

bestPractices: Lead with problem-solution fit clearly
Use real data and metrics, not vanity numbers
Keep energy high but information digestible
End with clear call-to-action and contact info

examples.sampleOutput: Y Combinator Demo Day videos, Sequoia Capital pitch deck examples, TechCrunch Disrupt presentations

templates.title: VR/AR Experience - First-Person Immersive Demo
templates.description: First-person perspective showcasing immersive VR/AR experiences with haptic feedback and spatial computing

prompt.main: POV: putting on sleek AR headset, real world transforms. Office walls become transparent, revealing data layers. Gesture opens portal to VR training simulation - suddenly in jet cockpit with full haptic suit feedback. Feel every control. Transition to architect walking through unbuilt building, making real-time modifications. Walls move with hand gestures. Cut to surgeon practicing on holographic patient, haptic gloves providing texture feedback. Multiple users join shared space as avatars, collaborating on 3D molecular model. Experience climax: standing on Mars surface, feeling wind through haptic suit. Smooth transition back to office, productivity metrics show 300% improvement.

elements.cameraMovement: First-person head movements, smooth transitions between realities, occasional third-person to show full setup
elements.subject: Next-gen VR/AR system with full-body haptics, eye tracking, and spatial computing
elements.scene: Multiple environments: office to cockpit to construction site to surgery to Mars
elements.motion: Natural head and hand movements, environmental responses, haptic visualization waves
elements.lighting: Reality-matched lighting in each environment, UI glows, transition effects
elements.atmosphere: Total immersion, transformative experiences, practical applications, wonder
elements.style: Ready Player One meets real-world applications with documentary authenticity

bestPractices: Avoid VR motion that could cause nausea
Show clear transitions between realities
Include both entertainment and practical uses
Demonstrate multi-user collaboration features

examples.sampleOutput: Meta Quest Pro demos, Apple Vision Pro experiences, Varjo Aero showcases

templates.title: Blockchain Visualization - Network Nodes & Transactions
templates.description: Visual representation of blockchain network with nodes, transactions, and smart contract execution

prompt.main: Open on global network visualization - thousands of nodes pulsing across world map. Zoom into single transaction: data packet forms, cryptographic signatures swirl around it. Follow packet through network, nodes validating with green confirmations. Smart contract triggers: code visualization shows conditions being met, automatic execution spawns multiple transactions. Mining visualization: computational power represented as energy fields solving complex puzzles. New block crystallizes, chain extends. Fork demonstration shows consensus mechanism choosing longest chain. DeFi protocol visualization: liquidity pools, yield farming, atomic swaps in real-time. Security features highlighted: encryption, immutability, decentralization. Close with real-world use cases transforming industries.

elements.cameraMovement: Flying through network connections, diving into blockchain structure, orbiting around smart contracts
elements.subject: Enterprise blockchain platform processing thousands of transactions per second
elements.scene: Abstract cyberspace with geometric node representations, data streams, crystalline block structures
elements.motion: Transactions flowing, blocks forming and linking, consensus waves, mining calculations
elements.lighting: Neon network lines, holographic blocks, energy pulses for mining, secure green confirmations
elements.atmosphere: Decentralized power, transparent security, innovative finance, transformative technology
elements.style: TRON Legacy aesthetics meets financial data visualization with cyberpunk elements

modifiedElements.subject: Decentralized finance protocols
modifiedElements.scene: Focus on liquidity pools and yield farming

modifiedElements.subject: NFT minting and trading visualization
modifiedElements.scene: Digital art gallery in blockchain space

bestPractices: Simplify complex concepts without losing accuracy
Show real use cases beyond cryptocurrency
Visualize security and transparency features
Include regulatory compliance aspects

examples.sampleOutput: Ethereum.org visualizations, Chainlink demonstrations, IBM Blockchain videos

templates.title: Clean Energy Tech - Renewable Innovation Showcase
templates.description: Solar panels, wind turbines, and energy storage systems with real-time efficiency data visualization

prompt.main: Sunrise time-lapse: advanced solar panels unfold like flowers, tracking sun with AI precision. Efficiency metrics overlay shows 40% conversion rate. Zoom out reveals floating solar farm on water, cooling effect boosting output. Transition to offshore wind turbines with maintenance drones, predictive AI preventing downtime. Underground: massive battery storage facility, energy flow visualization shows grid stabilization. Hydrogen production facility splits water using excess renewable energy. Smart grid AI orchestrates distribution, demand prediction prevents blackouts. Electric vehicle charges in minutes using new solid-state battery. Home receives 100% clean energy, meter runs backward. Data dashboard summarizes: carbon saved, costs reduced, grid reliability improved.

elements.cameraMovement: Sweeping drone shots of installations, technical close-ups, underground reveals, data visualization fly-throughs
elements.subject: Integrated clean energy ecosystem with solar, wind, storage, and smart distribution
elements.scene: Renewable energy installations from residential to utility scale, control centers, smart cities
elements.motion: Solar panel rotation, wind turbine spinning, energy flow visualization, data updates
elements.lighting: Natural sunlight for solar scenes, dramatic sky for wind, tech lighting for control centers
elements.atmosphere: Sustainable future, technological optimism, clean efficiency, climate solution
elements.style: National Geographic cinematography meets Bloomberg data graphics with Apple aesthetics

modifiedElements.scene: Home energy systems and personal EVs
modifiedElements.subject: Residential solar and battery systems

modifiedElements.scene: Massive solar farms and wind installations
modifiedElements.subject: Utility-scale renewable projects

bestPractices: Include real efficiency metrics and data
Show environmental and economic benefits
Demonstrate grid integration and reliability
Feature diverse renewable technologies

examples.sampleOutput: Tesla Energy presentations, Vestas wind turbine videos, SolarCity demonstrations

templates.title: Biotech Innovation - Lab Equipment & Molecular Animations
templates.description: Cutting-edge laboratory equipment in action with molecular-level visualizations of breakthrough discoveries

prompt.main: Robotic liquid handler pipettes with nanoliter precision, fluorescent samples glowing. Zoom into droplet: DNA sequencer reading genetic code in real-time, base pairs streaming past like data. CRISPR animation shows molecular scissors editing faulty gene, disease marker disappearing. Transition to bioreactor growing cultivated meat, cells dividing in time-lapse. AI analyzing millions of molecular combinations, finding drug candidate. 3D bioprinter constructs living tissue layer by layer, blood vessels forming. Automated microscopy captures cancer cell being destroyed by engineered T-cell. Mass spectrometer reveals new protein structure. Final montage: diseases cured, organs printed, sustainable food, extended lifespan. Lab team celebrates breakthrough.

elements.cameraMovement: Macro to micro transitions, smooth equipment tracking shots, journey through molecular space
elements.subject: State-of-the-art biotech lab with automated systems, AI drug discovery, and breakthrough therapies
elements.scene: Modern research facility with robotic automation, clean rooms, visualization theaters
elements.motion: Robotic precision movements, molecular animations, cell division, data streaming
elements.lighting: Clean lab lighting, fluorescent sample glows, laser illumination, UV visualization
elements.atmosphere: Scientific precision, life-saving innovation, breakthrough discoveries, hope for humanity
elements.style: CSI-style lab cinematography meets Pixar-quality molecular animation

bestPractices: Balance technical accuracy with visual appeal
Show human impact of discoveries
Include diverse biotech applications
Maintain scientific credibility while being accessible

examples.sampleOutput: Illumina sequencing videos, Moderna mRNA animations, Ginkgo Bioworks demonstrations
